issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderHasType' not 'HasCardOnBoard'. The text 'your Leader has the {Supernovas} type' directly references leader type checking.
Condition value should be {"type":"LeaderHasType","typeValue":"Supernovas"} not {"type":"HasCardOnBoard","name":"Leader with Supernovas type"}
Second effect object is completely extraneous and not present in card text. Card only describes play action on K.O., no KO/ReturnToHand actions exist.
Action missing 'rested' property. Card text specifies 'play...rested' which should be represented as {"rested":true}
